response.justification: Bogdan has deep, broad engineering experience spanning 25+ years with strong technical craftsmanship, open-source contributions, and full-stack fluency, including recent AI-agent work — but lacks clear evidence of cloud/AI platform strategy leadership, formal AI credentials, or director-level strategic impact required for this role.
strengths: 25+ years of hands-on software engineering across diverse domains and languages
Demonstrated AI-agent infrastructure experience and open-source tooling contributions
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor others through workshops and open-source projects
concerns: No explicit evidence of cloud platform strategy or AI product ownership at scale
Lacks advanced degree in AI or related field; education is BS in CS only
Limited visibility into cross-functional strategic partnership or customer advisory experience
